title: TwerkItAll
description: Spam Crouch to grow any plants in your vicinity.
body:
Spam Crouch to grow any crops or saplings in your vicinity.


# Example config
```yaml
# ./plugins/TwerkItAll/config.yml

# Grow Radius
x_range: 2
y_range: 2
z_range: 2

# % Chance that a single Crouch action grows a plant
grow_chance: 0.1
```
